message:
fix: resolve remaining staticcheck findings

- S1009: Remove redundant nil checks before len() in checkpoint_test.go
- S1016: Use type conversion instead of struct literal in output/success.go
- S1021: Merge variable declaration with assignment in pipeline/parser.go
- S1039: Remove unnecessary fmt.Sprintf calls in fetcher.go, analysis.go, priority.go
- SA4006: Remove unused variable assignments in test files
- SA4017: Remove unused Before() call in quota/claude_test.go

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -175,7 +175,7 @@ func FormatPriorityReport(report *PriorityReport) string {
 	var s string
 
 	s += "Priority Report\n"
-	s += fmt.Sprintf("════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")
+	s += "════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n"
 
 	if !report.GraphAvailable {
 		s += "Note: bv not available, priorities based on severity only\n\n"
